user_directive_summary: User explicitly changed policy: if even a slight validation improvement is visible, materialize, preflight, submit, and continue consuming available Kaggle quota through the 2026-06-15 deadline while logging GitHub and W&B progress. Later correction: do not burn five quota slots in one rapid batch; each submission must be followed by calibration/post-analysis, exact/near-duplicate CSVs must be blocked, and nearby same-family tuning must not be submitted immediately.

submission_threshold.minimum_validation_signal: mean_delta_vs_current_public_best_validation_anchor > 0 OR predeclared split-level positive signal with bounded preflight; strict MDE is no longer required under this user override
still_required: no external answer acquisition or reverse engineering
public package only unless competition rules clearly allow otherwise
candidate file passes schema/order/binary/per-user top-half preflight
record validation evidence and risk tier in report
log W&B summary and GitHub commit after each materialized/submitted candidate
post-submission calibration before the next submission cycle
block exact SHA duplicates and near-duplicate row-label files
quarantine nearby same-family variants after non-improving or negative-transfer public result
minimum autonomous row-diff >= 500 versus prior submitted/current-best CSVs unless manually re-approved
